chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.Nos.D-5747 & 5748 of 2016 --------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge --------------------------------------------------------------------- Present Mr.Justice Muhammad Ali Mazhar Mr.Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon C.P.No.D-5747 of 2016 Mst. Zeenat & others..................................................Petitioners V E R S U S Province of Sindh & others......................................Respondents C.P.No.D-5748 of 2016 Ali Nawaz & others.....................................................Petitioners V E R S U S Secretary Health Department Government of Sindh & others...................................................Respondents Date of hearing: 13.12.2016 Mr. M. Ayaz Kandhro, Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi, A.A.G. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Muhammad Ali Mazhar, J: At the very outset the learned counsel for the petitioners requests that earlier this court has already disposed of bunch of petitions i.e. C.P.No.D-4433 of 2016 and others vide order dated 27.10.2016. The learned counsel submits that the case of present petitioners is at par with the case of petitioners in the disposed of petitions, therefore, he requests that these petitions may be disposed of in the same terms. The learned A.A.G. has gone through the order and memos of petitions. He has no objection. By consent the aforesaid petitions are disposed of in terms of paragraph 6 of the order passed by this court on 27.10.2016 in C.P.No.D-4433 of 2016 and others. Pending applications are also disposed of. Judge Judge Asif
